hyperedges.label: NativeWind + RHF + Zod formam a stack de UI/forms
Auth: Google Sign-In + JWT próprio + expo-secure-store
SDD Bloco A UX tasks (auth polish, drawer, group hub)
Match detail organizer post-game flow (result -> stats -> finalize)
match lifecycle mutation wrappers (invalidate detail + group list)
series creation then add dates flow
pt-BR locale namespaces aggregated into resources
Zod form schemas with i18n messages

nodes.label: End-to-end type safety
nodes.rationale: Types come from backend Zod -> OpenAPI -> Kubb, never hand-written; a schema change breaks the app typecheck in CI, making desync impossible.

nodes.label: Kubb OpenAPI codegen pipeline
nodes.rationale: Kubb reads a committed openapi.json fixture and generates types + TanStack Query hooks (pluginOas/pluginTs/pluginReactQuery), so builds do not depend on a live backend and no fetch is hand-written.

nodes.label: Module-based (not vertical slice) architecture
nodes.rationale: Organized by type + module (components/users, hooks/<module>, schemas/<module>) so any dev understands any screen fast and structure is copyable across company apps.

nodes.label: Own JWT + Google Sign-In auth
nodes.rationale: Google Sign-In yields an idToken exchanged by the Fastify backend for app access/refresh JWTs stored in expo-secure-store and sent as Authorization: Bearer; no email/password, no Cognito/Amplify.

nodes.label: Authentication-only gating (no roles/personas)
nodes.rationale: No useCan/<Can>/permissions catalog; the only gate is the Stack.Protected auth guard and the backend restricts data by ownership. 401 -> forceLogout, 403 -> inline toast.

nodes.label: Presigned URL upload flow
nodes.rationale: Pick (image/document picker) -> validate -> POST /presign -> PUT direct to S3 from file:// uri -> notify backend; two-step presign+notify so the backend confirms the object exists before creating the entity.

nodes.label: NativeWind v4 styling
nodes.rationale: Tailwind className on RN components via nativewind preset + global.css + babel jsxImportSource; dark-first theme, mental parity with the company web frontend.

nodes.label: Expo Router file-based routing
nodes.rationale: Files in src/app are routes; groups (auth)/(tabs), [id] dynamic params via useLocalSearchParams, typed routes, and auth guard via Stack.Protected in root _layout.

nodes.label: EAS Build/Update/Submit delivery
nodes.rationale: Native binaries via EAS Build/Submit and JS-only OTA via EAS Update, gated by runtimeVersion; no Docker/Nginx/S3/CloudFront.

nodes.label: Football group/pickup-match domain
nodes.rationale: API domain: groups, members, matches, attendance, teams, result, stats, votes, invites, players, series, dues -- amateur football group management (mensalidades, escalação, votação de craque).
